goals: Calculate a discount on a product price to understand savings
Calculate markup pricing to learn how to set selling prices for products
Calculate future value of an investment to understand how savings can grow
Compare multiple investment scenarios using a future value table

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and eager to learn practical financial skills. Prefers step-by-step understanding and asks clarifying questions when needed.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Has basic math skills but is new to financial calculations. Does not know financial formulas or tool names. Interested in learning concepts useful for community financial planning and small business pricing.

end_condition: The user has successfully performed all four types of financial calculations and understands how to use discounts, markups, and investment projections for practical financial planning.
